summary_one_line: Input must embed the literal 'trak' FOURCC table tag so the font exposes a tracking table and requested_tracking becomes true.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte sequence 74 72 61 6b ('trak') must appear at a table-tag offset (seen at 0x0c-0x0f) so hb_aat_layout_has_tracking(face) is true and plan.requested_tracking (set from the 'trak' mask at line 126) is non-zero, making line 211 take the true branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five value_profile_cmplog winner seeds place the exact bytes 74 72 61 6b ('trak') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f (W byte set is 74(t)x9 / 72(r)x9 / 61(a)x9 / 6b(k)x9), and W uniquely invokes hb_aat_layout_track 151 times while L invokes it 0 times.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile loser seeds carry unconcentrated non-'trak' bytes at 0x0c-0x0f (e.g. 00/01/2c/2b/18/08/00/6a) and never present the 'trak' tag, so hb_aat_layout_track is invoked 0 times and line 211 stays on the false side (T=0 F=18).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator on top of value_profile. The hb_aat_layout_has_tracking lookup compares the font's table tags against the constant HB_TAG('t','r','a','k'); cmplog intercepts that 4-byte comparison and I2SRandReplace substitutes the captured constant into the input, planting 'trak' at the tag offset. value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace, so its CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback cannot reconstruct the exact 4-byte tag and the branch stays blocked.

evidence_trail.claim: The branch is the true side of line 211, gated by requested_tracking AND hb_aat_layout_has_tracking(face).
requested_tracking is set from the 'trak' table mask earlier in compile.
Winner seeds place the literal 'trak' tag bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x0f.
The W byte set at offsets 0x0c-0x0f is concentrated on the 'trak' bytes while L is unconcentrated and non-'trak'.
Winner uniquely invokes the tracking apply path 151 times while loser invokes it 0 times.
The blocker branch is true-only in W and false-only in L.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 211  T=15 F=0  T=0 F=18  plan.apply_trak = plan.requested_tracking && hb_aat_layou...  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile.
The winner resolves the branch in all 10 trials and the loser is blocked in all 10, a perfect I2S separation.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5715 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 3f368b250ab4cc50` and observed 2 I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 5 and 6 of the 7-level ancestor chain — the characteristic unwrapped-I2SRandReplace signal for cmplog/vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on hb_aat_layout_has_tracking where value_profile (no I2S) resolves the 'trak'-tag true branch as fast as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP gradient alone reconstructs the 4-byte tag without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The leaf mutation_op is TokenInsert and the dash rows sit two levels up the chain, so the final 'trak' placement could partly be token-dictionary aided rather than purely I2S substitution.
